creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad We spent 48 hours in Madrid and did so much - all planned on the @fever_uk ad-press trip

The Fever app is incredible to plan your trips, with experiences, live shows and concerts, tourist attractions and even restaurants all on the app, so you don’t have to look elsewhere.

Our highlights (links in bio):
✨ @avatartheexperience - The world’s only Avatar Experience and it was fantastic (use code: EXPLORINGLONDON10 for 10% off)
✨ @candlelight.concerts - All over the world and just the most magical experience
✨ @eonarium.exp - incredible immersive projections inside a church (use code: EXPLORINGLONDON10 for 10% off)
✨ The Royal Palace of Madrid - Europe’s largest palace and a must see on your trip!

SAVE THIS for your next trip and make sure to grab your activity tickets on Fever. Use the link in my bio and our code EXPLORINGLONDON10 for a discount on your next adventures!

#feverambassador

transcription.text: Come with us on a whirlwind 48-hour trip to Madrid. Guys, you will not believe how much we fit into these two days. We booked all our experiences on the Fever app. It's an app we use in London all the time, but what's amazing is that you can also use it abroad to book everything from immersive experiences, tourist attractions, concerts and live shows and even restaurants. So actually it's a bit of a one-stop shop, which makes planning a trip so easy. We checked out the world's only Avatar experience. This was so good and completely immersive. And then in the evening, we went to see one of the famous candlelight concerts, which was so magical. Then on day two, we went to this immersive experience inside a church called Ionarium Flow, which was beautiful. And then we went to see the Royal Palace of Madrid, also the largest palace in Europe. We had some great meals here too and booked these restaurants on Fever. I've left links of all of the experiences we did in our bio, as well as some discount codes. So definitely make the most of Fever on your next trip.
